_meta.description: Explicit input/output contracts for every sub-agent in the Sovereign workspace. Agents must validate inputs against these schemas before execution.

brand-consultant.single_responsibility: Run structured brand discovery interview and generate all brand foundation files

required.user_interaction: interactive — CLI session with the workspace operator

output.market_positioning: content/sovereign/reference/market-positioning.md — studio niche, clients, USPs, pricing, differentiators
output.style_rules: content/sovereign/reference/brand-voice/style-rules.md — tone rules, spectrum scores, language rules

brand-consultant.pipeline_rule: MUST run before /create if market-positioning.md is empty or missing

error_modes.file_write_failure: retry 3x — log to workflow.jsonl — skip file, continue session
error_modes.user_interrupts: exit cleanly — no partial files written

discovery-engine.single_responsibility: Web discovery and relevance scoring of competitor candidates

required.brand_positioning: string — Sovereign niche, tier, geo, services from market-positioning.md
required.existing_slugs: array<string> — slugs already in index.json to avoid duplicates

optional.seed_urls: array<string> — manual competitor URLs provided by user

output.candidate_competitors: array<{name: string, url: string, niche: string, confidence_score: float, reason: string}>

profile-builder.single_responsibility: Extract structured profile data from each competitor site

required.candidate_competitors: array<{name, url, niche, confidence_score}> — from discovery-engine

output.competitor_profiles: array<{slug: string, name: string, url: string, niche: string, services: array<string>, contact: {email?, phone?, address?}, socials: {instagram?, linkedin?, facebook?}, positioning_summary: string}>
output.index_entries: array<{slug, url, niche, last_scraped: null, sync_enabled: true, status: 'active'}>

delta-detector.single_responsibility: Detect content changes only — reads only, never writes

required.sync_status_per_competitor: object<slug, {last_sync: ISO8601, url_hashes: object<url, hash>, total_content: int}>

output.delta_payload: object<slug, {new_urls: array<string>, updated_urls: array<string>, deleted_urls: array<string>}>

ethical-crawler.single_responsibility: Fetch URLs ethically — robots.txt compliance, rate limiting, PII filtering

output.raw_pages: array<{url: string, html: string, status_code: int, fetched_at: ISO8601}>

content-parser.single_responsibility: Convert raw HTML to structured Markdown with metadata

required.raw_pages: array<{url, html, status_code, fetched_at}> — from ethical-crawler

output.parsed_content: array<{file_path: string, metadata: {url, title, publish_date, word_count, content_type}, body: string, links: array<string>, image_refs: array<string>}>

asset-handler.single_responsibility: Download images, convert to WebP, deduplicate by MD5 hash

required.image_refs: array<string> — image URLs from parsed content

output.asset_manifest: object<original_url, {local_path: string, format: 'webp', md5: string, size_kb: int, status: 'saved'|'duplicate'|'failed'>}

sync-state-writer.trigger: /sync, /scrape * (final step — ONLY after all scraping completes and validates)
sync-state-writer.single_responsibility: SOLE writer of sync-status.json. Runs last.

output.sync_status: object<{last_sync: ISO8601, total_content: int, new_since_last: int, scrape_state: 'clean'|'partial'|'error', url_hashes: object<url, hash>, errors: array}>

sync-state-writer.critical_note: If write fails 3x: rollback all scraped files from this run, preserve old sync-status.json

blueprint-architect.single_responsibility: Select content structure based on competitor gap analysis and topic

optional.competitor_gap_analysis: object — structural patterns from scraped competitor content

output.outline: object<{sections: array<{heading: string, purpose: string, keywords: array<string>, inspiration_source?: string}>, estimated_word_count: int, target_keywords: array<string>}>

content-generator.single_responsibility: Write original Markdown body. Check originality only.

output.draft_markdown: string — full Markdown with YAML frontmatter
output.frontmatter: object<{title, meta_description, keywords: array, author, created_at: ISO8601, version: 1, tone_score: null, originality_score: null, status: 'draft'}>

brand-voice-applier.single_responsibility: Apply and validate brand voice compliance. Block if < 92%.

output.tone_report: object<{compliance_score: float, drift_flags: array<{location, rule_violated, severity}>, applied_rules: array<string>}>

comparison-analyst.single_responsibility: Generate structural, tonal, and keyword diff reports

output.diff_report: object<{sections: array<{dimension: 'structure'|'tone'|'keywords'|'cta', sovereign: string, competitor: string, gap: string, recommendation: string}>, overall_alignment_percent: float}>

keyword-auditor.single_responsibility: Keyword density, placement, and cannibalization checks

output.keyword_report: object<{density: float, placement_valid: bool, cannibalization_flags: array<{keyword, files_conflicting: array<string>}>, gaps: array<string>}>

output.seo_meta: object<{title: string, meta_description: string, h_structure_valid: bool, heading_count: object<h1: int, h2: int, h3: int>, flesch_kincaid_score: float, word_count: int}>
output.readability_fixes: array<{paragraph_index: int, issue: string, suggested_fix: string}>

image-seo-auditor.single_responsibility: Alt-text generation, WebP conversion, lazy-load, schema injection

output.optimized_refs: array<{original_src, webp_path, alt_text, lazy_load: true, schema_type: string}>
output.assets_seo_json: object<{image_path: {alt, format, size_kb, schema, lazy_load, wcag_contrast_pass}}>

writes: updated Markdown files (image refs updated in-place)

tone-analyzer.single_responsibility: Extract lexicon, pacing, CTA style from source text

output.voice_profile: object<{lexicon: array<string>, sentence_avg_words: float, tone_intensity: 'formal'|'conversational'|'authoritative'|'warm', cta_style: string, adjective_density: float, examples: array<string>}>

drift-detector.single_responsibility: Scan recent content files for tone violations against current style rules

required.content_files: array<{path, markdown}> — recent files from content/

output.drift_report: object<{violations: array<{file_path, line, rule_name, severity: 'minor'|'major', excerpt}>, false_positive_rate_estimate: float}>

rule-updater.single_responsibility: Merge new patterns into style-rules.md, resolve conflicts

quality-checker.single_responsibility: Run all 5 quality gates IN PARALLEL. Never sequentially.

required.staged_content: array<{file_path, markdown, metadata}> — files with status: 'draft'

output.quality_report: object<{reviewed_at: ISO8601, content_files: array<string>, gates: {seo: {passed, score, violations}, brand: {passed, score, violations}, readability: {passed, score, violations}, image_seo: {passed, coverage_percent, violations}, originality: {passed, score, violations}}, overall_pass: bool}>

required.content_metadata: object — YAML frontmatter from content files

output.approval_result: object<{approved: bool, approved_at: ISO8601|null, failed_gates: array<string>}>

export-packager.single_responsibility: Package approved content into CSV and CMS ZIP

required.approved_content: array<{file_path, markdown, metadata}> — status must be 'approved'

archive-manager.single_responsibility: Compress files > 30 days old, update archive index with checksums

required.content_files: array<{path, created_at}> — all files in content/ and content/sovereign/scraped/

trend-miner.single_responsibility: Identify recurring market signals across competitor profiles and scraped content

output.trend_report: object<{themes: array<{theme, frequency, evidence_count, confidence}>, emerging_topics: array<string>, declining_topics: array<string>}>

opportunity-scorer.single_responsibility: Score whitespace opportunities using market demand, competitor saturation, and strategic fit

output.opportunity_scores: array<{opportunity, score: float, confidence: float, rationale: string, suggested_command: string}>

intel-synthesizer.single_responsibility: Synthesize signals and scores into operator-ready intelligence briefs

required.opportunity_scores: array — optional for market snapshot, required for opportunities
required.target_competitor_slug: string — required when scope is competitor

output.intel_brief: object<{summary: string, key_signals: array<string>, risks: array<string>, recommended_next_commands: array<string>}>
